field_of_view_deg: 81.9-39.5 horizontal per imager; up to 360 combined
features: Four independent 3MP imagers with motorized zoom/focus on a single IP address
Up to 360 coverage (imagers adjustable on 4 axes)
Bosch Intelligent Video Analytics + Camera Trainer
release_notes: The NetCamCenter NDM-7702-A (Bosch FLEXIDOME multi 7000i OEM) is a rugged IP66/IK10 outdoor multi-imager panoramic dome combining four independently aimable 3MP imagers with motorized zoom/focus lenses on a single IP address for up to 360 coverage, delivering 30 fps H.265, 120 dB HDR and onboard Intelligent Video Analytics.

frigate.notes: Bosch OEM (FLEXIDOME multi 7000i) multi-imager — each of the 4 imagers exposes its own stream. Use ONVIF auto-discovery to enumerate the imager streams.

home_assistant.notes: Bosch is ONVIF-conformant; add each of the 4 imagers via the ONVIF integration.

blue_iris.notes: Bosch OEM — use the ONVIF/RTSP (or 'Bosch') profile; add each imager as a separate camera.
